about-us: Welcome to Pronite your ultimate gateway a world of celebration, exploration, and connection. Established with a passion for curating unforgettable experiences, Pronite is more than just an event platform – it's a movement that brings people together to celebrate life's moments, explore new horizons, and forge meaningful connections. Our Mission At Pronite, our mission is clear: to redefine the way wev celebrate and connect. We strive to create a platform where every event becomes an opportunity for joy, every exploration unveils new possibilities, and every connection transforms into a lasting bond. We are committed to bringing people closer through immersive experiences that leave a lasting imprint on their lives. Our Values Inclusivity: Pronite is a platform for everyone. We believe in inclusivity, diversity, and creating spaces where individuals from all walks of life can come together and share in the joy of celebration. Innovation: We embrace innovation in every aspect of our journey. From hosting unique events to leveraging cuttingedge technology, we are committed to staying ahead of the curve and providing our community with experiences that stand out. Integrity: Integrity is the foundation of Pronite. We operate with transparency, honesty, and a commitment to delivering on our promises. Our users can trust us to provide reliable information, secure transactions, and a safe environment for celebration. Collaboration: Pronite thrives on collaboration – be it with event organizers, collaborators, or our vibrant community. We believe that through collaboration, we can create experiences that surpass expectations and leave a lasting impact. Join us at Pronite, where every celebration is an adventure, every exploration is a discovery, and every connection is a story waiting to unfold. Together, let's celebrate, explore, and connect like never before. Client testimonials Mohit Jurani      Bigshot owner Read More A Night to Remember! From themed parties to curated experiences, each event is crafted for a unique and memorable encounter. AI-Driven Recommendation System The integration of an AI-driven recommendation system sets Pronite apart. privacy-policy: PRONITE PRIVACY POLICY Effective Date: 15 December 2023 1. Introduction Pronite respects the privacy of our users and is committed to protecting their personal information. This Privacy Policy outlines our practices regarding the collection, use, and sharing of your personal information through our website  Pronite.in 2. Information Collection Personal Information: We collect information that identifies you as an individual, such as your name, email address, contact details, and payment information. This information is gathered when you register on our site, make a purchase, or interact with our services. Non-Personal Information: We may also collect non-personal information, such as browsing data, preferences, and usage statistics, to enhance our services. 3. Use of Information The information collected is used to: Process transactions and provide our services. Improve website functionality and user experience. Communicate with you about our services, offers, and updates. Ensure compliance with our terms of service and legal obligations. 4. Sharing of Information Third Parties: We may share your information with third-party service providers for purposes such as payment processing, website hosting, and data analysis. These parties are prohibited from using your personal information for any other purpose. Legal Requirements: We may disclose your information if required by law or if we believe it is necessary to protect our rights, property, or safety. 5. Data Security We implement appropriate security measures to protect against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction of your personal data. However, no Internet transmission is completely secure or error-free. 6. User Rights You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. Please contact us if you wish to exercise these rights. 7. Changes to This Policy Pronite reserves the right to modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page. 8. Contact Us For any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at Info@pronite.in
refund-policy: Pronite Refund Policy Effective Date: 15 December 2023 1. General Policy At Pronite, we strive to offer the highest quality services to our customers. Please be aware that all sales and services finalized with Pronite are final. We do not offer refunds or exchanges except under specific conditions as outlined below. 2. No Refunds or Exchanges All purchases made through Pronite are considered final. We encourage our customers to carefully review their orders before finalizing them. We do not permit refunds or exchanges, and customers are responsible for their purchases and all associated charges. 3. Refunds for Non-Delivery of Services Eligibility for Refund: If you experience a charge to your card or bank account for a transaction made on the Pronite platform without the delivery of services within 15 days of the transaction, you may be eligible for a refund.* Reporting Non-Delivery: To report a non-delivery, please inform us by sending an email to info@pronite.in or through a message on our contact page. Include in your report the transaction date and order number for us to investigate. 4. Investigation and Refund Process Investigation: Upon receiving your report, Pronite will conduct an investigation. If it is determined that the charge occurred without proper delivery of the services, we will initiate a refund process. Refund Issuance: Once your refund is confirmed, the amount will be credited back to your original method of payment. The refund will be processed within 7 working days from the date we receive your email. 5. Contact Information For any questions or concerns regarding our Refund Policy, please contact us at info@pronite.in. 6. Policy Updates Pronite reserves the right to modify this Refund Policy at any time. Any changes will be effective immediately upon posting on our website.
